flavor_groups.name: Sodium Type
flavor_groups.description: How much do you want Sodium to change rendering?

choices.name: Vanilla
choices.description: Do not install Sodium and attempt vanilla rendering.

choices.name: Sodium
choices.description: Installs Sodium and Indium, greatly increasing performance.

choices.name: Sodium Extras
choices.description: Installs Sodium, Sodium Extras and Indium, greatly increasing performance while providing more options.

choices.name: Shaders
choices.description: Installs Sodium, Sodim Extras, Indium and Iris, allowing for use of shader packs.
